reviews.review_description:
Through adult eyes, there is potential but a little limited in scope with occasional glitches in movement.

However, let a child have a go and they love feeding, patting and helping various dinosaurs grow. My son (who I feared already knew most things about dinosaurs), didn’t want to stop and recommended it to friends. Would recommend it as a safe and gently introduction to VR for the younger generation.
The update is great and the mini games are fun. Adding new dinosaurs would make the game even better.

Dinosaur Garden is a refreshing and enjoyable experience where you hatch, care for, and raise baby dinosaurs into adulthood. Feeding them, comforting them when they need attention, and watching them grow creates a strong sense of attachment and progression.

The educational elements are a great addition, letting you learn about different dinosaur species while playing. The observation platforms are well designed, allowing you to safely admire your dinos as they grow. Overall, it’s a charming and relaxing experience with solid potential, perfect for both younger players and adults looking for something cozy and informative.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind review!
We’re really glad you enjoyed the cozy, educational experience and caring for the dinosaurs. Your support means a lot to us!

reviews.review_title: Fun, charming, and has great potential
reviews.review_description:
Dinosaur Garden is a lovely and relaxing VR experience.
The world is colorful, the dinosaurs are fun to interact with, and it’s very family-friendly.
I especially like how it mixes play and light learning in a natural way.
Adding a new update with dinosaur eggs (hatching or collecting) would make the game even more fun and engaging.
Great game with lots of potential — looking forward to future updates!

Such a cute way to intact play and learn about dinosaurs. A special thank you to  Meta Quest Promotions Giveaways and  Referrals for giving me the opportunity to learn about this game. Great for adults and children of all ages

So this is not what I normally play, but, loved the education part, it was great watching what seemed scaled dinosaurs walk past whilst listening to details about them.  I do hope the devs add more dinosaurs.  The 'play' aspect I feel needed a bit more work. There needs to be better physics when touching the dinosaurs and I did find I could walk through them. I also feel a snap turn would be useful, but I am sure the devs will continue to update and improve this title.  I do feel a younger audience will enjoy it more than a seasoned gamer, that said I did enjoy it...
Great little game if your interested in dinosaurs  , not very much of a long game but my son loves it and thinks its so cool to have baby dinosaurs to hatch

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback!
We’re really happy to hear your son enjoyed the game and loved hatching the baby dinosaurs. We’re continuing to develop the experience and add more content over time—thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: My child loved exploring the dinosaurs. Fun, safe, and very family friendly.
Colorful world, cute dinosaurs, and very easy to enjoy. Great for kids and adults.
Easy to play, colorful visuals, and no stress. A nice VR experience for kids.
Simple, charming, and well made. Looking forward to future updates.

I got it to have a look at the size of the dinosaurs, which I love how vr can do. 

Hope you are still developing this and can make them look a little better and without lined edges on their bodies. The environment is very basic. 

Mixed reality would be cool like in ocean rift. And have dinosaurs walking about outside your room. Just for a suggestion.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the thoughtful feedback!
We’re actively working on the next version of the game, including visual improvements and overall environment upgrades. We’re also exploring new interactive ways to play together with dinosaurs. Your suggestions are very helpful and appreciated!

reviews.review_description: This is a great game for players new to VR to gain experience, the controls are intuitive, its a great way to show burgeoning players how to interact with games.  (It's a nice way to learn about dinosaurs), for an experienced VR player the experience may be short lived  due to the limited interactions.
My kids enjoyed playing while learning a little about dinosaurs. Well balanced game.
Relaxing, positive, and suitable for young players. We really enjoyed it together.
Easy to play, colorful visuals, and relaxing gameplay. Highly recommended.
A nice mix of fun and light learning. Perfect casual VR experience.
